data.title: Company accelerates Bitcoin purchases, buys fourth-largest amount this year, worth $48 billion.
data.description: Recently, Strategy made its fourth-largest Bitcoin acquisition of the year. This news closely followed Michael Saylor's viral defense of the company, which turned into a popular meme.

data.title: Jobley to exhibit at CDS Midwinter Meeting for the second year, showcasing its smart dental recruiting solution; event marks 161st Chicago gathering - Bellevue, Wash., February 17, 2026.
data.description: Jobley is set to showcase its intelligent dental recruiting solution for the second consecutive year at the 2026 exhibit in Bellevue, Washington. The hiring platform, catering to U.S. dental and healthcare professionals, revealed its participation as an exhibitor at the upcoming 161st event in Chicago on February 17, 2026.

data.title: Rebel Bourbon introduces Rebel Kentucky Straight Bourbon Whiskey Single Barrel 2026 selected by Kyle Busch. Annual limited-edition release with each barrel hand-picked by Busch, partnering with Richard Childress Racing.
data.description: Richard Childress Racing's official bourbon has introduced its annual limited-edition release for the second consecutive year, with each barrel personally selected by Busch. The announcement was made in St. Louis on February 17, 2026. This special edition of Rebel Bourbon gives fans an additional reason to celebrate, with the collaboration bringing a unique touch to the exclusive barrels chosen for this year's release.

data.title: Infleqtion, a quantum computing company, goes public after SPAC merger in 2026 amid market struggles.
data.description: Today, Infleqtion enters the market as a publicly traded company following a SPAC merger, amidst a downturn in quantum computing stocks in 2026. The company's debut comes as investors keep a close watch on the industry.

data.title: Netflix gives Paramount final chance in Warner Bros. bidding war, allowing merger talks for "best and final offer." Stocks rise for Warner Bros, Paramount, and Netflix.
data.description: Netflix has given Warner Bros. the green light to resume merger discussions with Paramount, providing a final opportunity for a "best and final offer." Following this news, the stocks of Warner Bros., Paramount, and Netflix all saw an increase in value. This move comes amid a fierce bidding war between Warner Bros. and Paramount, with two companies trying to secure the deal. The recent development has sparked investor interest, resulting in a positive impact on the stock market.
Fed bids for 6-month bills total $3.5 bln.

Eu council: ‘Today greenlighted a set of decisions making financial assistance under SAFE available to 8 additional EU member states This will help them acquire modern defence equipment & boost readiness.’

data.title: Bitcoin price drops below $70K after $168M buy, amid US-Iran tensions. Broad risk-asset sell-off triggers BTC long positions liquidation.
data.description: The price of BTC dropped below $70,000, a key level, due to escalating tensions between the US and Iran. This led to a sell-off of risk assets, liquidating late BTC long positions.

data.title: Netherlands updating tax on unrealized crypto gains by 2028, causing controversy among critics.
data.description: Starting in 2028, the Netherlands will be implementing changes in the way taxes are assessed on unrealized gains. This new tax policy has caused controversy among critics of cryptocurrency, but the situation is more complex than it may seem.

data.title: ISG to study providers aiding enterprises in building AI-ready infrastructure. Focus on AI training, inference, and scale.
data.description: A new study has been initiated by ISG to analyze providers aiding businesses in establishing AI-capable infrastructure for AI training, inference, and deployment on a large scale. This study will assess key players in the industry and their offerings to support enterprises in implementing AI technologies effectively.

data.title: CrowdStrike receives Frost & Sullivan's Company of the Year award for Cloud Workload Security and Global SaaS Security Posture Management for the second time. Leader in cloud security.
data.description: In Austin, Texas, CrowdStrike (NASDAQ: CRWD) has been honored as Frost & Sullivan's Company of the Year for Cloud Workload Security in 2026. This recognition comes after being named the 2025 Company of the Year for Global SaaS Security Posture Management for the second year in a row. These achievements highlight CrowdStrike's dominance in cloud runtime security for cloud workloads, SaaS environments, and AI, all integrated into a cohesive platform. This acknowledgment underscores CrowdStrike's expertise as AI continues to drive cloud adoption.

data.title: Midwest FiberPath plans 1,200-mile multi-conduit platform in the Central US for AI traffic; aims to enhance carrier mesh diversity.
data.description: Midwest FiberPath, LLC unveiled their new project in Cedar Rapids, Iowa on February 17, 2026. The company revealed their strategy for a long-haul infrastructure platform spanning 1,200 miles. This multi-conduit backbone is specifically designed to accommodate AI traffic flowing in both east-west and north-south directions. In addition, the platform aims to enhance carrier mesh diversity for future applications.

data.title: Sean Hannity to launch "Hang Out with Sean Hannity" podcast in March, featuring long-form interviews. Expanding media footprint.
data.description: In March 2026, a new podcast called "Hang Out with Sean Hannity" will be introduced, offering long-form interviews with prominent figures. The podcast is part of FOX News Channel, and will be hosted by Sean Hannity who aims to broaden his media presence through this new venture. The launch is set to take place in the upcoming month, as announced on February 17, 2026. This initiative showcases Hannity's endeavor to engage audiences in a different format and provide in-depth conversations with influential voices within the media industry.

data.title: Hydrogen combustion engine market to reach USD 20.8B by 2036 at 28.5% CAGR due to policy and infrastructure changes.
data.description: Policy clarity and advancements in infrastructure are steering fleets towards utilizing hydrogen internal combustion engines (H2-ICE) as a viable third option in addition to battery-electric and fuel cells. In NEWARK, Del., on Feb. 17, 2026, the hydrogen combustion engine market is projected to increase from a value of USD 1.7 billion in 2026 to...

data.title: Union Home Mortgage appoints Renee Hildebrand as National VP of Mergers & Acquisitions, with 25+ yrs in the industry.
data.description: With more than 25 years of expertise in the mortgage sector, Renee Hildebrand joins Union Home Mortgage (UHM) in Strongsville, Ohio. The high-growth independent mortgage banking firm, known for its exceptional culture, disclosed the hiring of Renee on February 17, 2026.

data.title: AI energy boom: Trump's plan to quadruple nuclear capacity meets prediction of AI data center consumption doubling by 2026.
data.description: Eagle Energy Metals Corp announced from Vancouver, BC on Feb 17, 2026, that President Trump's directive to increase nuclear capacity by four times is facing a challenge as projections suggest that AI data center consumption may double by 2026. This clash comes at a time of growing energy demands, with nuclear energy production set to experience a significant surge alongside the rapid expansion of AI technologies.

data.title: TOPDON USA sales soared by 70% in 2025, positioning them as an industry leader in diagnostic technology with innovative tools.
data.description: TOPDON USA, a leading provider of diagnostic tools for automotive professionals and DIYers, saw a significant sales increase of 70% in 2025 compared to 2024 in the U.S. market. The company launched multiple new products including ArtiDiag EU, RLink J2534, TP58, V3000, UltraDiag Moto, V1200Air, ArtiDiag HD, TS004 Pro, and BT600Plus. They also invested in non-profit and auto education programs nationwide. Vice President Chad Schnitz highlighted the company's success in offering advanced technology at competitive prices, becoming a trusted brand in just nine years since entering the U.S. market in 2017. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: EToro (NASDAQ: ETOR) stock surges after Q4 earnings report with $.71 EPS and $3.88B revenue. Net contribution was $227M.
data.description: EToro Group Ltd. (NASDAQ: ETOR) shares have seen an increase in trading on Tuesday following the release of their fourth-quarter financial results. The company reported adjusted earnings per share of 71 cents and revenue of approximately $3.88 billion for the quarter. This strong performance has led to a surge in their stock price, making EToro one of the top performers of the day. The CFO of EToro, Meron Shani, stated that the fourth-quarter results highlight the robustness of their multi-asset business model. Additionally, the company reported a net contribution of $227 million in the fourth quarter. This information has caused shares to jump, as investors react positively to the company's financial report.
